summary.key_theme: 公司發布優於預期的 Q4 財報與強勁的 2027 財年財測，並獲得大型執法機構合約，推動股價顯著上漲。

bullish.title: Cognyte Software shares are trading higher after the company reported better-than-expected Q4 adjusted EPS results and issued FY27 guidance above estimates.
bullish.reason: 公司 Q4 調整後每股盈餘 (EPS) 優於預期，且 2027 財年財測高於市場共識，顯示營運成長動能強勁，為股價上漲主要驅動力。

bullish.title: One Of US State Law Enforcement Agencies Selects Cognyte Software In A Contract Valued At Approximately $5M, To Deploy Cognyte's Tactical SIGINT Solution To Support Mission-critical Investigations And Real-time Field Operations Across Its State
bullish.reason: 獲得價值約 500 萬美元的美國州級執法機構合約，證明其戰術 SIGINT 解決方案的市場競爭力與長期營收穩定性。

bullish.title: Cognyte Software: Compelling EBITDA, Low Dilution — Cognyte Software stands out amid tech sector pessimism, offering recurring revenue and resilience against near-term AI d
bullish.reason: 分析師指出公司具備強勁的 EBITDA 表現與低稀釋風險，且其經常性收入模式在科技業波動中展現出高度韌性。

neutral.title: Cognyte Software Ltd. (CGNT) Q4 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
neutral.reason: 提供財報會議逐字稿，屬於資訊揭露性質，供投資人深入了解管理層對未來策略的說明。

neutral.title: Cognyte Software Ltd. 2026 Q4 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation
neutral.reason: 公司發布的財報簡報檔，為投資人提供財務數據的視覺化呈現，屬中性資訊揭露。
